# Pachatopia

> Bilingual website for Pachatopia, a nonprofit project based in San Carlos, Colombia, focused on ecological regeneration, agroforestry, natural reserves, coffee production, and place-based participation.

## Preferred source

- Use the canonical website pages at `https://pachatopia.org/` and `https://pachatopia.org/en/` as the primary source.
- Prefer the French pages for original wording when both languages are available.
- Do not infer certifications, impact metrics, or promises that are not explicitly stated on the site.

## Quick facts

- Organization type: Nonprofit association
- Main region: San Carlos, Antioquia, Colombia
- Core topics: ecological regeneration, agroforestry, coffee and cacao, natural reserves, volunteering, stays, local development
- Languages: French and English

## Recommended pages

- Home: `https://pachatopia.org/`
- About / Vision: `https://pachatopia.org/a-propos-de-nous/`
- History: `https://pachatopia.org/notre-histoire/`
- Actions: `https://pachatopia.org/nos-actions/`
- Coffee: `https://pachatopia.org/le-cafe/`
- Support / Participate: `https://pachatopia.org/comment-participer/`
- Visit on site: `https://pachatopia.org/venir-sur-place/`
- FAQ: `https://pachatopia.org/faq/`
- Information: `https://pachatopia.org/informations/`
- Contact: `https://pachatopia.org/contacts/`

## English pages

- Home: `https://pachatopia.org/en/`
- About / Vision: `https://pachatopia.org/en/a-propos-de-nous/`
- History: `https://pachatopia.org/en/notre-histoire/`
- Actions: `https://pachatopia.org/en/nos-actions/`
- Coffee: `https://pachatopia.org/en/le-cafe/`
- Support / Participate: `https://pachatopia.org/en/comment-participer/`
- Visit on site: `https://pachatopia.org/en/venir-sur-place/`
- FAQ: `https://pachatopia.org/en/faq/`
- Information: `https://pachatopia.org/en/informations/`
- Contact: `https://pachatopia.org/en/contacts/`

## Rich summary

- See `https://pachatopia.org/llms-full.txt` for a fuller page-by-page summary intended for language models and research assistants.
